title: Control Panel Cooling Fan, Filter & Thermostat Price in Pakistan 2026 — MCC / PLC / VFD Panel Ventilation Complete Buyer Guide
author: CNC Electric Pakistan
summary_html: Complete buyer guide for control panel cooling fans, filter mats, and thermostats in Pakistan 2026. Covers DIN rail fan pricing (Rs. 1,800–12,000), thermostat setpoints for Pakistan summer (35°C ON vs European 40°C), filter mat replacement intervals for cement/textile/food environments, fan sizing formula (Q = 3.1 × P / ΔT), IP42/IP54/IP65 selection rules, anti-condensation heaters for monsoon panels, and fan vs heat exchanger vs panel AC decision guide. Pakistan-specific: 45–50°C summer ambient, WAPDA load-shedding temperature spikes, VFD IGBT derating above 40°C, thermal overload relay compensation, and the 7 most costly panel cooling mistakes with PKR estimates.
image_alt: Control panel cooling fan filter thermostat price Pakistan 2026 — MCC PLC VFD panel ventilation buyer guide
topic_cluster_role: Panel thermal management — extends D45 PSU life, D30 VFD reliability, D32 Thermal Overload accuracy
